Customer 2 years, plain sword, no previous contract:
- 100 base + 10 first-insurance - 20 loyalty (20% of 100 policy base) + 5 fee = 95 G

Loyalty applies to policy base premium per spec. So:
- policy base = 100
- first-insurance (10% of base, per item) = 10
- loyalty discount (20% of policy base = 100) = -20
- fee = 5
- Total: 100 + 10 - 20 + 5 = 95
